brief_justification: Paper A is a condensed-matter transport study of how a transverse electric field reshapes the electronic band structure (Fermi surface, Fermi velocity, effective mass, gaps) of a graphene ribbon; Paper B describes JaxoDraw, a Java GUI software tool for drawing and exporting Feynman diagrams. There is no shared transferable machinery — one is quantum band/transport physics, the other is interactive drawing software — so no role-for-role mapping exists.
